summary: GX cleanup and matching PR focused on replacing hand-written mask/or bitfield expressions and several inline-assembly stubs with C implementations using INSERT_FIELD and named GX FIFO command constants. It touched GXTransform, GXTev, GXFrameBuf, GXBump, GXTexture, and the GX private header, with the PR body explicitly stating: "Refactor to prefer INSERT_FIELD macro."
what_changed: Replaced many manual bitfield updates of the form mask-and-or with INSERT_FIELD calls in GXFrameBuf.c, GXTexture.c, GXTransform.c, and GXTev.c.
Converted GXSetTevColor from a NON_MATCHING C block plus an inline assembly fallback into a C implementation that builds two BP register words with INSERT_FIELD and writes them through WGPIPE.
Converted GXSetAlphaCompare from inline assembly into C using INSERT_FIELD for ref0, ref1, comp0, comp1, op, and register id 0xF3 before writing a GX_LOAD_BP_REG command.
Converted GXSetNumTevStages from inline assembly into C that updates the relevant context word and sets x4F0_flags |= 4.

Converted GXSetViewportJitter from inline assembly into C, preserving the field==0 half-pixel top adjustment, viewport_v context updates, optional __GXSetRange call, XF register FIFO writes, and set_x2(GX_TRUE).
Converted GXSetScissorBoxOffset from inline assembly into C and updated its private header prototype from UNK_FUNC(GXSetScissorBoxOffset) to void GXSetScissorBoxOffset(u32 x_off, u32 y_off).
Simplified GXSetCurrentMtx and GXSetScissor to use INSERT_FIELD rather than explicit masks.
Replaced raw FIFO command literal 8 in __GXSetMatrixIndex with GX_LOAD_CP_REG.
Removed local named float constants such as lbl_804DE2F0, lbl_804DE2F4, lbl_804DE2F8, lbl_804DE308, and lbl_804DE30C from GXTransform.c and used literal float operands in assembly comments or C code.

Cleaned up context member access in places: examples include moving from x100_data indexing to x1D0 or x204 in GXFrameBuf/GXBump excerpts, although the exact struct-field correctness is only evidenced by the diff slice.
smart_moves: Used INSERT_FIELD to express GX BP/XF register packing declaratively; this makes field width and shift visible and reduces error-prone hexadecimal masks.

Kept some stubborn expressions as explicit mask/or where likely needed for codegen, e.g. parts of GXSetTexCopySrc and GXSetScissorBoxOffset, rather than forcing every bitfield update through the macro.
Replaced anonymous or raw command values with GX_LOAD_BP_REG, GX_LOAD_XF_REG, and GX_LOAD_CP_REG where shown, improving readability without changing FIFO write ordering.
Matched assembly behavior by preserving duplicated writes in GXSetTevColor: after writing the first color word, the C version writes the second word three times as shown by the removed assembly.
Updated the header prototype when GXSetScissorBoxOffset became known C, capturing parameter types and names instead of leaving it as UNK_FUNC.
Removed redundant temporary GXContext variables in small setters and wrote directly through __GXContexts.main, reducing local-noise once the access pattern was understood.
decomp_lessons: For GX register builders, prefer INSERT_FIELD(dest, value, width, shift) over open-coded masks when it still matches; it encodes intent and avoids recalculating mask constants.
When replacing inline assembly that writes WGPIPE, preserve not just the final register value but the exact sequence of command bytes and data writes.
Header cleanup should accompany asm-to-C work: once a function signature is known, replace UNK_FUNC with a typed prototype.

Context arrays and callbacks may be temporary stand-ins for better-identified struct fields; use evidence from offsets such as x1D0, x204, x4F0_flags, viewport_v, and projection_v to improve field names gradually.
Named constants produced only to satisfy assembly labels can sometimes be removed once literals are accepted or the function is rewritten, reducing artificial rodata clutter.
C implementations can still intentionally keep compiler-friendly temporary names like temp_f31 or temp_f29 when those help preserve floating-point register allocation for matching.
naming_conventions: Known GX API functions use official-style names such as GXSetTevColor, GXSetAlphaCompare, GXSetNumTevStages, GXSetViewportJitter, GXSetScissorBoxOffset, GXSetCurrentMtx, and GXInitTlutRegion.
GX command constants are preferred over magic command bytes where available: GX_LOAD_BP_REG, GX_LOAD_XF_REG, GX_LOAD_CP_REG, GX_LOAD_INDX_C, and GX_CMD_CALL_DL.
Private or still-unknown context members in this slice retain offset-style names such as x80, x84, x1D0, x204, x4F0_flags, x454_pad, and x458.
Header parameter names can be descriptive once known; GXSetScissorBoxOffset was declared as void GXSetScissorBoxOffset(u32 x_off, u32 y_off).
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Inline assembly stubs were removed for GXSetTevColor, GXSetAlphaCompare, GXSetNumTevStages, GXSetViewportJitter, and GXSetScissorBoxOffset where C could reproduce behavior.
INSERT_FIELD was the main matching tactic for rlwimi-style bit insertion into BP register words.
WGPIPE writes were modeled with typed accesses such as WGPIPE.u8, WGPIPE.u32, and WGPIPE.f32 to match FIFO command/data order.
GXSetViewportJitter used explicit floating temporaries and half-width/half-height computations to reproduce FPR-sensitive codegen.
Some asm annotations in GXProject were adjusted to show literal loads such as 0.0F, 1.0F, and 0.5F after removing local lbl_ rodata symbols.
State dirty flags were preserved after register/context mutations, including x4F0_flags |= 6 in GXSetNumIndStages and x4F0_flags |= 4 in GXSetNumTevStages.
set_x2(GX_FALSE) or set_x2(GX_TRUE) calls were retained after FIFO writes where the original assembly wrote to the context state field.
review_feedback: No line review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
One collaborator review by ribbanya approved the PR with an empty body on 2022-09-18T13:21:44Z.
The only explicit PR-body rationale was: "Refactor to prefer INSERT_FIELD macro."
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename GXContext fields x1D0, x204, x454_pad, or x458 to semantic names.
Search for other GX register packing sites that still use manual mask/or instead of INSERT_FIELD.
Check whether GXSetTevOrder, GXSetCopyFilter, GXSetTexCopyDst, GXSetTevColorS10, and GXInitTexCacheRegion were later converted from asm to C.
Compare later changes to GXSetViewportJitter for cleanup of temp_f31/temp_f29 style matching temporaries.
